verdicts.note: A zero requires evidence for both record and renewal poles; relevant management and finance experience without direct office service establishes neither a genuine mix nor an explicit renewal case.
A zero requires genuinely mixed evidence; relevant finance and management work without auditor-office tenure does not supply affirmative renewal evidence.

review_notes: All six pairs were checked. Direct office and long county records are supported; professional relevance versus absent office tenure is an evidence gap, not a neutral position.
